label: 第269話
source_locator: 単行本30巻 目次 p.109
summary_short: 乙骨は元の肉体へ戻り、仲間たちは新宿決戦の作戦と問題点を検討する。冥冥は新陰流の門外不出の縛りを生んでいた当主を処理し、簡易領域の継承問題を解決する。
summary_full: 乙骨は元の肉体へ戻り、仲間たちは新宿決戦の作戦と問題点を検討する。冥冥は新陰流の門外不出の縛りを生んでいた当主を処理し、簡易領域の継承問題を解決する。乙骨はリカの維持と家入の処置で元の肉体へ戻る。生存者は作戦の問題点を検討し、日車の生存、簡易領域の縛り、新陰流当主を冥冥が処理した事情が明かされる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 憂太 returns to his body but has to answer to 真希 for his role in the raid. This leads to the jujutsu sorcerers discussing the end of the 人外魔境新宿決戦 and the current state of the 新陰流 Style.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: At some point in time, 冥冥 enters a candy store and asks the elderly shopkeeper what the price of a candy bar is. In the present, 真希 chews out 憂太 , who has miraculously returned to his original body. 悠仁 , 恵 and 野薔薇 then enter the room, with 恵 wanting to apologize to everyone, though his apology is dismissed by 真希. 悠仁 also wants to apologize to the others, but is interrupted by 日下部 who states that the fault lies in 五条 who didn't kill 悠仁, and 羂索 who used 悠仁 for jujutsu terrorism. Despite his past opinions, 日下部 affirms the first-years that only the adults were to blame for what transpired, not them. 悠仁 asks 憂太 how he managed to return to his body. 憂太 reveals that after he transplanted his brain into 五条's body, 里香 sustained his body using 反転術式 . As a result, when 羂索's burnt-out 術式 recovered, a near-death 憂太 was able to reconnect with 里香, his external storage for cursed techniques, and survive by returning to his body. 日下部 speculates that 羂索 divided his cursed techniques using barrier techniques , allowing his brain transplant technique to continue functioning after using a domain. 真希 chastises 憂太 for his actions during the fight, believing the sorcerers could have won more easily if she ambushed 羂索 in the Lake Gosho Colony and 日車 carried a recording of 棘 's 呪言 . Since it isn't possible to activate multiple instances of cursed speech, only one voice recording would have usable. 東堂 refutes her suggestion, stating that he wouldn't have been able to target 真希 with 不義遊戯 , which was vital for the sneak attack to succeed. Furthermore, 憂太 and 里香 were also necessary to stop the rampaging 呪霊 released by 呪霊操術 . Speaking for 棘 and corroborating 東堂, パンダ states that the backlash from cursed speech would have killed 狗巻 if 宿儺 was subjected to it in better condition. 日車 , alive but with a broken arm, interjects by saying that 宿儺 would have killed him if 憂太 was around. He reveals that it was his decision to use 棘's recording inside 憂太's domain instead of his since 誅伏賜死 forbids all acts of violence. 日下部 is amazed that 日車, who has been a sorcerer for only two months survived, though the latter believes it is unfortunate that he did. Meanwhile, 真希 continues her scolding, stating that the fight would have been different if ミゲル and ラルゥ joined from the start. Everyone unanimously agrees, with 憂太 desperately explaining that the two said they wouldn't help, even though they did. 悠仁 tries to defuse the argument, stating that 憂太 prevented 宿儺's second 領域展開 and his cursed tool helped hide his fingers, to no avail. 秤 joins in, saying that being able to wait inside 里香 allowed the sorcerers to quickly attack after 五条's loss and let him draw away 裏梅 . 東堂 and 猪野 both feel responsible for not saving 脹相 , though 悠仁 assures them that he would have died had 脹相 not stayed to save him. 真希 ultimately relents on her scolding of 憂太, to 棘 and パンダ's amusement. Meanwhile, 三輪 voices how scared she was acting as 真希's marker and domain counter, while 桃 and 秤 voice their regrets for not participating in the battle against 宿儺. 憂憂 declares himself as the MVP of the battle, much to 綺羅羅 's chagrin since he left them during the battle. After 憂憂's comments on their weight leads to a scuffle, 日下部 comments on how 冥冥 had an easier job, which 憂憂 refutes since his older sister had to take care of the 新陰流 Style issue. 冥冥 admits that she had it easy since she wouldn't bet on something she couldn't exchange for money, which is her own life. 秤 inquires about the 新陰流 Style issue, asking if it was about the 縛り that forbade 簡易領域 from being taught to outsiders. 日下部 confirms so, explaining that 簡易領域's inventor Sadatsuna Ashiya created a 縛り that restricted its usage to the school's disciples to prevent curse users from learning it. 冥冥 adds on that 新陰流 Style has long lost interest from the public, so 簡易領域 is more of a trade secret now. As a result, the school monopolizes the technique and enforces the 縛り on invited disciples, particularly sorcerers without techniques who are dependent on 新陰流 Style. When asked why the 縛り was unreasonable, 冥冥 explains that among other complications, a student couldn't refuse summons to action from the school's head. A particularly troublesome part of the 縛り, more akin to a curse, supposedly allows the head to absorb the lifespans of the disciples. However, this can't be confirmed since no one knows who the head is, or how the contract is fulfilled since some disciples were able to live long lives. Even if the head were to die and the senior disciple inherits the position, their identity will remain unknown. 日下部 explains that only the head of 新陰流 Style can undo the binding vows before revealing that he is the current head and has already undone them. 憂憂 asks 日下部 to leave some perks for the new disciples, with 冥冥 suggesting that he collect monthly fees from the disciples when he becomes the head. When she confronted the shopkeeper, 冥冥 clarified that she was asking for the price of their life. The elder asked how she managed to find them and discover their identity as the 新陰流 Style head. 冥冥 teasingly replied that she asked someone who knew, before exposing the head's plan to increase their number of disciples in order to rival the 御三家 , eventually control the 呪術総監部 and take over the jujutsu world. The head realized that 天元 was the one who informed 冥冥. The grade 1 sorcerer then said that the lifespan-absorbing 縛り suggested the head had ambitions to achieve a long-term goal, which may come to fruition now that the 禪院家 was ruined and the 加茂 Clan and 五条 Clan may fall in the final battle . However, to 冥冥, anything more important than money can't be protected without it. If it weren't for the 新陰流 Style's exclusive control of 簡易領域, some sorcerers would still be alive. For the crime of endangering her little brother, the head pays 冥冥 with their life.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 冥冥 Head of 新陰流 Style 禪院真希 乙骨憂太 狗巻棘 日下部篤也 パンダ 伏黒恵 虎杖悠仁 釘崎野薔薇 五条悟 (言及のみ) 夜蛾正道 (言及のみ) 里香 (言及のみ) 家入硝子 (言及のみ) 羂索 (回想) 猪野琢真 星綺羅羅 秤金次 東堂葵 日車寛見 ミゲル Oduol ラルゥ 裏梅 (言及のみ) 脹相 (言及のみ) 三輪霞 西宮桃 憂憂 Sadatsuna Ashiya (言及のみ) 九十九由基 (言及のみ) 天元 (言及のみ)
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 東京 呪術高専 東京 呪術高専

key_events_verified_phase11: 乙骨は元の肉体へ戻り、仲間たちは新宿決戦の作戦と問題点を検討する。
冥冥は新陰流の門外不出の縛りを生んでいた当主を処理し、簡易領域の継承問題を解決する。
乙骨はリカの維持と家入の処置で元の肉体へ戻る。
生存者は作戦の問題点を検討し、日車の生存、簡易領域の縛り、新陰流当主を冥冥が処理した事情が明かされる。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
